# BloFin.Net Full AI Reference

This file is optimized for AI coding assistants. It maps the actual BloFin.Net API shape, options, endpoint groups, symbols and common implementation patterns.

## Identity

- Repository: `JKorf/BloFin.Net`
- Package: `BloFin.Net`
- Current project version: `2.10.3`
- Base library: `CryptoExchange.Net`
- REST client: `BloFinRestClient`
- Socket client: `BloFinSocketClient`
- Credentials: `BloFinCredentials(string key, string secret, string pass)`

BloFin.Net is not a single `ExchangeApi` library. REST exposes `AccountApi` and `FuturesApi`; sockets expose `FuturesApi`.

Result model:

- REST methods return `HttpResult<T>` or `HttpResult`.
- WebSocket subscriptions return `WebSocketResult<UpdateSubscription>`.
- Shared non-I/O symbol/cache helpers return `ExchangeCallResult<T>`.
- Always check `.Success` before reading `.Data`.

## Correct Setup

```csharp
using BloFin.Net;
using BloFin.Net.Clients;
using BloFin.Net.Enums;

var restClient = new BloFinRestClient(options =>
{
    options.ApiCredentials = new BloFinCredentials("API_KEY", "API_SECRET", "PASSPHRASE");
    options.Environment = BloFinEnvironment.Live;
});

var socketClient = new BloFinSocketClient(options =>
{
    options.ApiCredentials = new BloFinCredentials("API_KEY", "API_SECRET", "PASSPHRASE");
});
```

## Options

REST options:

- `BloFinRestOptions.Environment`
- `BloFinRestOptions.ApiCredentials`
- `BloFinRestOptions.BrokerId`
- `BloFinRestOptions.ExchangeOptions`

Socket options:

- `BloFinSocketOptions.Environment`
- `BloFinSocketOptions.ApiCredentials`
- `BloFinSocketOptions.SocketSubscriptionsCombineTarget`, default `10`
- `BloFinSocketOptions.ExchangeOptions`

Global defaults:

```csharp
BloFinRestClient.SetDefaultOptions(options =>
{
    options.ApiCredentials = new BloFinCredentials("API_KEY", "API_SECRET", "PASSPHRASE");
});
```

Dependency injection is available through `services.AddBloFin(...)`.

## REST API Map

### AccountApi

Use `restClient.AccountApi` for general account and asset transfer history:

- `GetAccountBalancesAsync(accountType, asset)`
- `TransferAsync(asset, fromAccount, toAccount, quantity, clientId)`
- `GetAccountConfigAsync()`
- `GetApiKeyInfoAsync()`
- `GetTransferHistoryAsync(asset, fromAccount, toAccount, startTime, endTime, limit)`
- `GetWithdrawalHistoryAsync(asset, withdrawId, transactionId, status, startTime, endTime, limit)`
- `GetDepositHistoryAsync(asset, depositId, transactionId, status, startTime, endTime, limit)`
- `SharedClient`

### FuturesApi.ExchangeData

Use `restClient.FuturesApi.ExchangeData` for public futures market data:

- `GetSymbolsAsync(symbol)`
- `GetTickersAsync(symbol)`
- `GetOrderBookAsync(symbol, depth)`
- `GetRecentTradesAsync(symbol, limit)`
- `GetIndexMarkPriceAsync(symbol)`
- `GetFundingRateAsync(symbol)`
- `GetFundingRateHistoryAsync(symbol, startTime, endTime, limit)`
- `GetKlinesAsync(symbol, KlineInterval.OneMinute, startTime, endTime, limit)`
- `GetIndexPriceKlinesAsync(symbol, KlineInterval.OneMinute, startTime, endTime, limit)`
- `GetMarkPriceKlinesAsync(symbol, KlineInterval.OneMinute, startTime, endTime, limit)`
- `GetPositionTiersAsync(symbol, marginMode)`

### FuturesApi.Account

Use `restClient.FuturesApi.Account` for futures account configuration:

- `GetBalancesAsync(productType)`
- `GetMarginModeAsync()`
- `SetMarginModeAsync(marginMode)`
- `GetPositionModeAsync()`
- `SetPositionModeAsync(positionMode)`
- `GetLeverageAsync(symbol, marginMode)`
- `SetLeverageAsync(symbol, leverage, marginMode, positionSide)`

### FuturesApi.Trading

Use `restClient.FuturesApi.Trading` for futures orders, positions and fills:

- `GetPositionsAsync(symbol)`
- `PlaceOrderAsync(symbol, side, orderType, quantity, marginMode, price, positionSide, reduceOnly, clientOrderId, takeProfitTriggerPrice, takeProfitOrderPrice, stopLossTriggerPrice, stopLossOrderPrice)`
- `PlaceMultipleOrdersAsync(orders)`
- `PlaceTpSlOrderAsync(symbol, orderSide, marginMode, quantity, positionSide, reduceOnly, clientOrderId, takeProfitTriggerPrice, takeProfitOrderPrice, stopLossTriggerPrice, stopLossOrderPrice)`
- `PlaceTriggerOrderAsync(symbol, side, marginMode, triggerPrice, triggerPriceType, positionSide, quantity, clientOrderId, orderPrice, reduceOnly, slTpOrders)`
- `CancelOrderAsync(orderId, symbol, clientOrderId)`
- `CancelOrdersAsync(orders)`
- `CancelTpSlOrdersAsync(orders)`
- `CancelTriggerOrderAsync(orderId, symbol, clientOrderId)`
- `GetOpenOrdersAsync(symbol, orderType, status, afterId, beforeId, limit)`
- `GetOpenTpSlOrdersAsync(symbol, orderId, clientOrderId, afterId, beforeId, limit)`
- `GetOpenTriggerOrdersAsync(symbol, orderId, clientOrderId, beforeId, afterId, limit)`
- `ClosePositionAsync(symbol, marginMode, positionSide, clientOrderId)`
- `GetOrderAsync(symbol, orderId, clientOrderId)`
- `GetTpSlOrderAsync(symbol, orderId, clientOrderId)`
- `GetClosedOrdersAsync(symbol, orderType, orderStatus, afterId, beforeId, startTime, endTime, limit)`
- `GetClosedTpSlOrdersAsync(symbol, orderId, clientOrderId, status, afterId, beforeId, limit)`
- `GetClosedTriggerOrdersAsync(symbol, orderId, clientOrderId, status, afterId, beforeId, limit)`
- `GetUserTradesAsync(symbol, orderId, afterId, beforeId, startTime, endTime, limit)`
- `GetPriceLimitsAsync(symbol, side)`
- `GetPositionHistoryAsync(positionId, symbol, status, afterId, beforeId, startTime, endTime, limit)`

## Websocket API Map

Use `socketClient.FuturesApi`.

Public subscriptions:

- `SubscribeToTradeUpdatesAsync(symbol, onMessage)`
- `SubscribeToKlineUpdatesAsync(symbol, KlineInterval.OneMinute, onMessage)`
- `SubscribeToIndexPriceKlineUpdatesAsync(symbol, KlineInterval.OneMinute, onMessage)`
- `SubscribeToMarkPriceKlineUpdatesAsync(symbol, KlineInterval.OneMinute, onMessage)`
- `SubscribeToOrderBookUpdatesAsync(symbol, depth, onMessage)`
- `SubscribeToTickerUpdatesAsync(symbol, onMessage)`
- `SubscribeToFundingRateUpdatesAsync(symbol, onMessage)`

Private subscriptions:

- `SubscribeToPositionUpdatesAsync(onMessage)`
- `SubscribeToOrderUpdatesAsync(onMessage)`
- `SubscribeToTriggerOrderUpdatesAsync(onMessage)`
- `SubscribeToBalanceUpdatesAsync(onMessage)`
- `SubscribeToInverseBalanceUpdatesAsync(onMessage)`

## Symbols

BloFin futures symbols are hyphen-separated:

- `BTC-USDT`
- `ETH-USDT`

Use:

```csharp
var symbols = await restClient.FuturesApi.ExchangeData.GetSymbolsAsync();
var eth = symbols.Data.SingleOrDefault(x => x.Symbol == "ETH-USDT");
```

Avoid:

```text
ETHUSDT
ETH_USDT
ETH/USDT
tETHUSD
ExchangeApi
SpotApiV3
UsdFuturesApiV3
FuturesApiV2
```

## Result Handling

```csharp
var result = await restClient.FuturesApi.ExchangeData.GetOrderBookAsync("ETH-USDT", 20);
if (!result.Success)
{
    Console.WriteLine($"BloFin error: {result.Error}");
    return;
}

Console.WriteLine(result.Data.Bids.Length);
```

For sockets:

```csharp
var sub = await socketClient.FuturesApi.SubscribeToTickerUpdatesAsync("ETH-USDT", update =>
{
    Console.WriteLine(update.Data.LastPrice);
});

if (!sub.Success)
{
    Console.WriteLine(sub.Error);
    return;
}

await socketClient.UnsubscribeAsync(sub.Data);
```

For shared clients:

```csharp
using CryptoExchange.Net.SharedApis;

var futuresShared = restClient.FuturesApi.SharedClient;
var info = futuresShared.Discover();
var supported = info.Features.Where(x => x.Supported).Select(x => x.EndpointName);
Console.WriteLine($"{info.Exchange} {info.TypeName}: {string.Join(", ", supported)}");
```

Use `CryptoExchange.Net.SharedApis` interfaces from each exchange's `.SharedClient` for multi-exchange code. Call `.Discover()` before routing optional shared features across exchanges.

## Known Nonexistent Patterns

These are wrong for BloFin.Net:

```csharp
client.ExchangeApi.ExchangeData.GetTickerAsync("ETH-USDT");
client.SpotApi.ExchangeData.GetTickerAsync("ETHUSDT");
client.UsdFuturesApi.Trading.PlaceOrderAsync(...);
new BloFinCredentials("key", "secret");
BinPeriod.OneMinute;
```

Use:

```csharp
client.FuturesApi.ExchangeData.GetTickersAsync("ETH-USDT");
client.FuturesApi.Trading.PlaceOrderAsync("ETH-USDT", OrderSide.Buy, OrderType.Limit, 1m, MarginMode.Cross, 2000m);
new BloFinCredentials("key", "secret", "passphrase");
KlineInterval.OneMinute;
```
